member.name: T:BaseNetwork
member.summary: <summary> Abstracts away most of the similar functionality between {@link Network} and {@link MirrorNetwork} </summary> <param name="<BaseNetworkT>">- The network that is extending this class. This is used for builder pattern setter methods.</param> <param name="<KeyT>">- The identifying type for the network.</param> <param name="<BaseNodeT>">- The specific node type for this network.</param>

member.name: M:BaseNetwork.RemoveDeadNodes
member.summary: Remove any nodes from the network when they've exceeded the {@link BaseNetwork#maxNodeAttempts} limit

member.name: M:BaseNetwork.GetNodesToRemove(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,KeyT})
member.summary:
<summary> Returns a list of index in descending order to remove from the current node list.
Descending order is important here because {@link BaseNetwork#setNetwork(IDictionary<String, KeyT>)} uses a for-each loop. </summary> <param name="network">- the new network</param> <returns>- list of indexes in descending order</returns>

member.name: M:BaseNetwork.GetNumberOfMostHealthyNodes(System.Int32)
member.summary:
Returns `count` number of the most healthy nodes. Healthy-ness is determined by sort order; leftmost being most healthy. This will also remove any nodes which have hit or exceeded {@link BaseNetwork#maxNodeAttempts}.
Returns a list of nodes where each node has a unique key.
member.exception: when a thread is interrupted while it's waiting, sleeping, or otherwise occupied

member.name: P:BaseNetwork.HealthyNodes
member.summary: The list of currently healthy nodes.

member.name: M:BaseNetwork.AddSeconds(Client.DEFAULT_MIN_NODE_BACKOFF.)
member.summary: The instant that readmission will happen after.

member.name: M:BaseNetwork.lock(this)
member.summary: Set the new LedgerId for this network. LedgerIds are used for TLS certificate checking and entity ID checksum validation.

member.name: M:BaseNetwork.lock(this)_2
member.summary: Limit for how many times we retry a node which has returned a bad gRPC status

member.name: M:BaseNetwork.lock(this)_3
member.summary: The current minimum backoff for the nodes in the network. This backoff is used when nodes return a bad gRPC status.

member.name: M:BaseNetwork.lock(this)_4
member.summary: The current maximum backoff for the nodes in the network. This backoff is used when nodes return a bad gRPC status.

member.name: M:BaseNetwork.lock(this)_5
member.summary: The min time to wait before attempting to readmit nodes.

member.name: M:BaseNetwork.lock(this)_6
member.summary: The max time to wait for readmitting nodes.

member.name: M:BaseNetwork.lock(this)_7
member.summary: Timeout for closing either a single node when setting a new network, or closing the entire network.

member.name: P:BaseNetwork.TransportSecurity
member.summary: Is the network using transport security

member.name: F:BaseNetwork.set
member.summary:
Intelligently overwrites the current network.
Shutdown and remove any node from the current network if the new network doesn't contain it. This includes checking both the URL and {@link AccountId} when the network is a {@link Network}.
Add any nodes from the new network that don't already exist in the network.

member.name: M:BaseNetwork.ReadmitNodes
member.summary: Readmits nodes from the `nodes` list into the `healthyNodes` list when the time is passed the {@code EarliestReadmitTime}. While readmitting nodes the `EarliestReadmitTime` will be updated to a new value. This value is either the value of the node with the smallest readmission time from now, or `minNodeReadmitTime` or `maxNodeReadmitTime`.

member.name: M:BaseNetwork.GetNodeProxies(KeyT)
member.summary: Get all node proxies by key
